name: Masovian Voivodeship (Poland)

colors.symbolism: the historic field colour of Masovia
the silver of the Masovian eagle
the eagle's beak, claws, and crown

description: Red field charged at centre with the crowned silver eagle of Masovia.
history: Adopted by the Masovian Voivodeship after its formation in 1999, restoring the medieval heraldic device of the Mazovian Piasts.

features.symbolism: the historic field colour of Masovia

features.role: Masovian white eagle, crowned, with golden beak and claws
features.symbolism: the historic emblem of the Duchy of Masovia
